products.description: The Noise Twist Go Round Dial Smartwatch is the perfect gift for anyone who appreciates style and functionality. Whether for a busy professional or a fitness lover this smartwatch blends innovation with style making it the ultimate thoughtful gift.

products.description: Achieve precision and perfection with every stroke using the Swiss Beauty Select Here To Stay Liquid Liner. Designed with an ergonomic grip and a finely pointed tip, this eyeliner makes application seamless and fuss-free. Its smudge-proof, water-resistant formula ensures long-lasting wear, taking your look effortlessly from day to night.

products.name: lipstic
products.description: Make a fearless statement with the Faces Canada Comfy Matte Wow Liquid Lipstick The Bold Edit comes with bold shades COCOA CRUSH, MAROON MAVEN. Designed for those who love intense, standout colours, this lightweight liquid lipstick delivers rich pigmentation in a single swipe. Its comfortable matte formula glides smoothly, sets quickly, and stays put for hours without drying out your lips. With bold, vibrant shades perfect for every mood and moment, this lipstick keeps your look striking, confident, and effortlessly chic all day long.

These are available in the latest trendy colors in 4 finishes, i.e. Glossy, shimmer , Glitter & metallic . DeBelle nail polish has a unique feature of long-lasting stay with gel based formula. Also, it does not require UV light for drying.

products.description: The Glam21 Translucent Powder is your all-in-one solution for shine control, smoothness, and long-lasting makeup wear. Designed to melt effortlessly into the skin, this ultra-fine powder delivers a flawless, soft-focus finish without looking chalky or heavy.

products.name: Himalaya
products.description: Himalaya Moisturizing Aloe Vera Face Gel is a water-based face gel. It is enriched with the goodness of pure aloe vera, which is renowned for its moisturizing properties. This non-sticky gel instantly hydrates and soothes skin by restoring moisture balance. The formula refreshes and cools your skin leaving it oil free, moisturized and healthy.

products.name: vitamin c face scrub
products.description: Glowing skin for the win! Crafted with the power of vitamin C and goodness of walnut, Mamaearth Vitamin C Face Scrub is your answer to clear and radiant skin. It scrubs away dirt and impurities while exfoliating gently. Vitamin C helps fight free-radical damage, while reducing pigmentation to give you glowing skin. Walnut shell powder, meanwhile exfoliates gently and scrubs away dead skin cells that can make your skin look dull.
